subject: Screenshot of error on my screen
description:
Here's the screenshot of the error I'm seeing:

data:image/png;base64,

The error says 'Your session has expired. Please log in again.' but when I try to log back in it just shows the same error. This started happening about an hour ago. I'm trying to use the Bloomberg terminal web interface and I can't get in. I have client trades to execute this morning.

data:image/jpeg;base64,

Please help, this is urgent.

description:
THIS IS MY FOURTH TIME WRITING ABOUT THIS.

VPN still drops every 30 minutes. I'm remote and can't work.

To: IT Help Desk <helpdesk@contoso.com>

Subject: RE: Original ticket about VPN

Still happening. This is the third day. I've missed two client calls because of this.

--- Original Message ---
From: IT Help Desk <helpdesk@contoso.com>
To: Kevin Murray <kevin.murray@contoso.com>
Date: March 13, 2026 11:00 AM
Subject: RE: Original ticket about VPN

Hi Kevin,

Could you try restarting your router and reconnecting to the VPN? Also, please let us know:

- What is your ISP?
- Are you on Wi-Fi or Ethernet at home?

Thanks,
IT Help Desk

To: IT Help Desk <helpdesk@contoso.com>

Subject: Original ticket about VPN

Hi,

My VPN connection keeps dropping every 30 minutes or so. I'm working remotely from home and it's really disrupting my work. Using GlobalProtect on my Dell Latitude 5550. Windows 11. This started on Monday.

Thanks,
Kevin

subject:
URGENT
— Outlook not syncing
description:
Hi team,

My Outlook hasn't synced new emails since 7 AM this morning. I can see emails on my phone (Outlook mobile) but the desktop client shows nothing new. I've tried:

  • Restarting Outlook
  • Running the Repair option from Control Panel
  • Checking my internet connection (everything else works fine)

I'm on Microsoft 365 Apps for Enterprise, Version 2402 (Build 17328.20162). Laptop is a ThinkPad X1 Carbon Gen 11, Windows 11 23H2.

This is blocking me from responding to client inquiries. Please help ASAP.


Naomi Washington
Vice President, Client Relations
Contoso Financial Services
naomi.washington@contoso.com | +1 (212) 555-0391

subject: MIME boundary issue — original request inside
description:

Hi IT team,

I need to request a new SSL certificate for our internal API gateway at api-internal.contoso.com. The current cert expires on March 25 and we need to renew before then. This serves all internal microservice communication.

Please provision a new cert from our internal CA and deploy to the gateway.

Thanks,
Victor

subject: Error log from application — need help diagnosing
description:
The client portal has been throwing errors since the last deployment. Here's the log output:

2026-03-18T06:00:01.234Z ERROR [ClientPortal.API] Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlException: Timeout expired. The timeout period elapsed prior to completion of the operation or the server is not responding.
   at Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlConnection.OnError(SqlException exception, Boolean breakConnection, Action`1 wrapCloseInAction)
   at Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.SqlInternalConnection.OnError(SqlException exception, Boolean breakConnection, Action`1 wrapCloseInAction)
   at Microsoft.Data.SqlClient.TdsParser.ThrowExceptionAndWarning(TdsParserStateObject stateObj, Boolean callerHasConnectionLock, Boolean asyncClose)
2026-03-18T06:00:01.456Z ERROR [ClientPortal.API] Retry 1/3 failed for GetClientPortfolio(clientId=C-8234)
2026-03-18T06:00:03.789Z ERROR [ClientPortal.API] Retry 2/3 failed for GetClientPortfolio(clientId=C-8234)
2026-03-18T06:00:06.012Z ERROR [ClientPortal.API] Retry 3/3 failed for GetClientPortfolio(clientId=C-8234)
2026-03-18T06:00:06.013Z FATAL [ClientPortal.API] Circuit breaker OPEN for SqlConnection pool — all retries exhausted
2026-03-18T06:00:06.234Z WARN  [ClientPortal.HealthCheck] Database health check failed: connection pool exhausted (active=100, max=100)
2026-03-18T06:01:00.001Z ERROR [ClientPortal.API] 47 requests failed in last 60s with HTTP 500 — database connection pool exhausted
2026-03-18T06:02:00.001Z ERROR [ClientPortal.API] 52 requests failed in last 60s with HTTP 500 — database connection pool exhausted
2026-03-18T06:03:00.001Z ERROR [ClientPortal.API] 61 requests failed in last 60s with HTTP 500 — database connection pool exhausted

Connection string points to prod-sql-01.database.windows.net. The database itself seems responsive when I query it directly via SSMS — response times are normal. Feels like a connection pool issue, maybe a connection leak from the new code path.

This is impacting client-facing operations — about 30% of portfolio queries are failing.

subject: ＦＵＬＬ　ＷＩＤＴＨ — printing problem on floor 2
description:
Ｔｈｅ ｐｒｉｎｔｅｒ ｏｎ ｆｌｏｏｒ ２ is printing everything with garbled characters. Normal documents come out with random symbols mixed in. Started after someone tried to print a document with Japanese characters yesterday. I think the driver language settings got messed up.

Printer model: HP LaserJet Enterprise M507dn
Printer name on network: FLOOR2-PRINTER-01
Affects everyone on floor 2 — at least 5 people have reported the same issue today.

We need this fixed for the quarterly client reports going out tomorrow.

subject: RE: Automatic reply: Out of Office — Rajiv Mehta
description:
Thank you for your email. I am currently out of the office from March 15-22 and will have limited access to email.

For urgent matters related to the APAC trading desk, please contact:
- James Okafor (james.okafor@contoso.com) — Trading operations
- Wei Lin Tan (weilin.tan@contoso.com) — Client inquiries

For IT-related emergencies, please contact the IT Help Desk directly at helpdesk@contoso.com or ext. 4357.

I will respond to your email upon my return on March 23.

Best regards,
Rajiv Mehta
Managing Director, APAC Trading
Contoso Financial Services

--- On Mar 18, 2026, at 2:00 AM, IT Alerts <alerts@contoso.com> wrote:

Scheduled maintenance window: March 19, 2026, 02:00-06:00 UTC
Affected systems: APAC trading platform, Bloomberg feeds
Expected impact: Trading platform will be unavailable during this window.
Please plan accordingly.

subject: Azure DevOps pipeline failure — attached build log (WARNING: large output)
description:
Our main CI/CD pipeline for the client portal has been failing since last night. I've attached the build log but here's the relevant section:

##[section]Starting: Build
##[command]dotnet build ClientPortal.sln --configuration Release
  Determining projects to restore...
  All projects are up-to-date for restore.
  ClientPortal.Core -> /home/vsts/work/1/s/src/ClientPortal.Core/bin/Release/net8.0/ClientPortal.Core.dll
  ClientPortal.Infrastructure -> /home/vsts/work/1/s/src/ClientPortal.Infrastructure/bin/Release/net8.0/ClientPortal.Infrastructure.dll
CSC : error CS8032: An instance of analyzer Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Analyzers.MetaAnalyzers.CSharpRegisterActionAnalyzer cannot be created from /home/vsts/.nuget/packages/microsoft.codeanalysis.analyzers/3.3.4/analyzers/dotnet/cs/Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.CSharp.Analyzers.dll : Could not load file or assembly 'Microsoft.CodeAnalysis, Version=4.8.0.0
##[error]ClientPortal.API/Controllers/PortfolioController.cs(47,13): error CS0246: The type or namespace name 'PortfolioSummaryV2' could not be found (are you missing a using directive or an assembly reference?)
##[error]ClientPortal.API/Controllers/PortfolioController.cs(52,42): error CS1061: 'IPortfolioService' does not contain a definition for 'GetSummaryV2Async' and no accessible extension method 'GetSummaryV2Async' accepting a first argument of type 'IPortfolioService' could be found
##[section]Finishing: Build

Looks like someone merged a PR that references a type/method that doesn't exist in the current branch. Pipeline name: 'client-portal-ci', project: 'ClientPortal', repo: 'contoso/client-portal'. Build ID: 28947.

This is blocking all deployments to staging and production.
